title: Silky Festive British Lemongrass-Takrai SpottedDick
description: A sweet, silky, and aromatic British dessert featuring the flavors of lemongrass and takrai, served in a dolsot stone bowl.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the lemongrass, sugar, and butter.
Heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sugar dissolves and the mixture turns light golden brown.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks and cream until smooth.
Add the flour to the egg yolk mixture and whisk until just combined.
Temper the egg yolk mixture by slowly pouring the warm sugar mixture into the egg yolks, whisking constantly.
Return the saucepan to medium heat and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
Remove from heat and stir in the takrai paste until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a piping bag fitted with a large round tip.
Pipe the mixture into a dolsot stone bowl lined with plastic wrap, creating 4-6 small mounds.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or until set.
